description: {"edges": "Irregular, some areas exhibiting necrosis and curling.", "veins": "Visible, but not prominently affected; some areas appear slightly chlorotic around veins."} {"color": "Dark brown to black.", "shape": "Irregular, ranging from small spots to larger, coalescing blotches. Some lesions have a slightly raised, textured appearance."} Symptoms are widespread across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration towards the margins and lower leaf surface. Lesions are scattered but numerous.
